name: Pork & Oyster Egg Roll Filling
recipeIngredient: Oysters (2 pints, shucked and liquid reserved)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, combine the ground pork, soy sauce, green onions, oysters and their liquid, lemon juice, sherry, and vegetable oil. Process briefly.
2. Heat the vegetable oil in a wok or frying pan.
3. Add the pork mixture to the hot oil. Add chopped onion, mushrooms, black pepper, and diced red pepper. Stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
4. Add the pineapple and reserved oyster liquid. Continue cooking for an additional minute.
5. Drizzle with sesame oil.
6. Cool and assemble egg rolls.
